question: Show the name and theme for all concerts and the number of singers in each concert.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.concert_name ,  T2.theme ,  count(*) FROM singer_in_concert AS T1 JOIN concert AS T2 ON T1.concert_id  =  T2.concert_id GROUP BY T2.concert_id
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.text_1, T1.text_2, COUNT(*) FROM table_3 AS T1 JOIN table_4 AS T2 ON T1.pk_1 = T2.pk_1 GROUP BY T1.pk_1
raw_response: SELECT T1.text_1, T1.text_2, COUNT(*) FROM table_3 AS T1 JOIN table_4 AS T2 ON T1.pk_1 = T2.pk_1 GROUP BY T1.pk_1
